title: Japanese Anime Music Event Promotional Poster AI
sourceTitle: Japanese Anime Music Event Promotional Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Dramatic Japanese anime-style 4:5 music event promotional poster for AI MUSIC BOOTCAMP 2 / AI音楽 ブートキャンプ 2, centered on anime music girl with long flowing deep blue hair, star hairpins, dark hoodie, and studio headphones around her neck. Subject: anime music girl with long flowing deep blue hair, star hairpins, dark hoodie, and studio headphones around her neck appears from the waist up at center-right, with flowing hair, star hairpins, hoodie, studio headphones, and softly blurred face treatment. Scene: Background: glowing sunset-to-night city skyline with sparkling lights, music-energy particles, lens flares, and glowing petals. creates the glowing sunset-to-night background with music-energy particles, lens flares, sparkling lights, and glowing petals. Composition: Fixed vertical event-ad layout with center-right anime girl, exact 8 text groups, massive gold headline, date bar, top copy, hashtag callout, bottom feature captions, left-edge 4-panel filmstrip, and two neon music icons in the lower area. Signature Elements: Eight Japanese text groups, AI music bootcamp title, gold headline, date bar, hashtag instructions, three feature captions, four-panel music filmstrip, smartphone music icon, microphone icon, glowing petals, and spark explosions. Fixed source details: City Background: glowing sunset-to-night city skyline with sparkling lights, music-energy particles, lens flares, and glowing petals. Style: Polished Japanese social media announcement, cinematic anime event poster, neon high contrast, glossy luminous typography, gold and white emboss effects, energetic streaks, and celebratory futuristic music mood. Color Palette: Fixed electric blue, violet, magenta, gold, sunset orange, bright white highlights, and deep city-night contrast. Lighting: Neon city glow, sunset rim light, luminous text bloom, gold headline sparkle, lens flares, and energetic particle highlights. Typography: 始まるのは、キミと創る 音楽の物語。 / AIを使って、みんなで音楽をつくる特別な3日間。, AI MUSIC BOOTCAMP 2 / AI音楽 ブートキャンプ 2, 開催決定!, 開催期間 5.2 SAT 土 - 5.4 MON 月, 参加はカンタン!! #AI音楽ブートキャンプ2 をつけて投稿するだけ!, and 一緒に学ぶ 仲間とつながる / AIで創る 新しい音楽体験 / 想いをカタチに 自分だけの1曲を appear as readable professional Japanese event typography, not random filler text. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
